round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent had no evidence in R1 and none in R2; no improvement possible.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent acknowledged other agents' evidence (boreal vegetation) to refine confidence, but the core reasoning remained static.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent synthesized cross-domain evidence (architecture/terrain) to boost confidence, but the botanical evidence itself was unchanged.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent moved from no evidence to a plausible inference based on architectural consensus, showing improvement.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent synthesized landscape observations to reinforce architectural claims, showing moderate improvement.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the available evidence, noting the absence of linguistic and regulatory data. It effectively weighted the Landscape, Botanics, and Meta agents' observations of architecture and terrain to confirm Norway, while appropriately dismissing Denmark due to topography.
